summary: Iteration 4 frontend testing complete. Verified: Hub difficulty-toggle (NORMAL↔HARD, persists via localStorage), tile-endless renders and navigates to /play/endless, Endless Marathon shows 3 stat cards (score/streak/lives) with HARD MODE tag, wrong answers reduce lives → Game Over panel with restart button. Nightmare Mode section conditionally renders after bossWins seeded (creeper_king/skeleton_lord/ender_dragon all =1), 3 nightmare tiles with purple gradient visible. Nightmare boss URL loads with 3× HP (240/240) and 7 player hearts, NIGHTMARE tag shown next to streak. Rewards page exposes mythic skin/weapon/pet testIds (magma_beast, frost_king, shadow_ender / inferno_blade, frost_bow, void_scythe / phoenix). Math Mine shows HARD MODE tag and uses hard problem display (e.g. '63 ÷ 7'). No backend testing requested (testing_type=frontend only).
critical_code_review_comments: Hub.jsx is ~275 lines and Nightmare-section IIFE is fine but consider extracting into a NightmareSection component for clarity (non-blocking).
EndlessMath.jsx useEffect dep array intentionally omits 'over'/'score' (eslint-disable used) — current behaviour correct but a subtle stale-closure risk if logic changes. Acceptable for now.
seed_data_creation: Used page.evaluate to seed localStorage 'mc_learn_v1' with bossWins.creeper_king=skeleton_lord=ender_dragon=1 to unlock Nightmare section; difficulty='hard' to test HARD MODE rendering.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features verified end-to-end via Playwright on public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. localStorage key is 'mc_learn_v1'. To unlock Nightmare tiles, seed bossWins all=1. To test mythic drops actually awarded, can either play boss with answers OR seed nightmareWins/skins/weapons/pets directly. Title 'Boss: Nightmare Creeper King' is rendered uppercase via CSS — case-insensitive matching recommended.
